typography.supporting: Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif

texture: Ordered pixel dither and diagonal hatch patterns used as categorical fills
motif: Aligned date columns joined to cross-sectional ranks, lagged target weights, and evidence records
composition: Sparse monochrome research canvas with precise mono labels, crisp grids, and limited categorical color
